title: Hub v2 Model Manifest
description: Per-entry manifest for a HubModel. v2 keys the entry off the envelope's reverse-DNS `name` (and `version`). The body is now parallel to the MCP shape: `repository` describes the upstream source-of-truth, `sources[]` lists the installable distributions (each carrying its own quantizations[]), and `dependencies[]` is the informational cross-entry reference list.

repository.description: Upstream source-of-truth metadata. Shape mirrors the official MCP server.json Repository definition.

url.description: Repository URL for browsing source code or model weights.

id.description: Repository identifier from the hosting service (e.g. HF repo path, GitHub repo ID).

subfolder.description: Optional relative path inside the repository to a nested entry.

websiteUrl.description: Project homepage or model card URL.

sources.description: One or more concrete distributions of this model. Each entry's quantizations[] enumerates the file variants the user can pick from.

dependencies.description: Informational cross-entry references. v2 does NOT auto-install dependencies; the FE surfaces them as 'Works best with' chips.
